narrative:
Cardinal Local Sd (Geauga) school district has 6,509 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -11.2% D−R vs -28.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
